flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 30% at Westminster College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (1.1k vs 1.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Westminster College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (67.0% → 52.2%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Westminster College rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.2k → $28.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 11 pp at Westminster College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (65.9% vs 76.4%).
